title: Frame-specific dependency licensing candidate
notes: Nineteenth-round mutation generated from the duration-have minimal pair and Gibson island-construction variation. It tests whether constructional frame fit and construction-specific dependency licensing explain contrasts that are too fine for broad operator value or recoverability alone. It is a scoped candidate, not a general grammaticality account.

edges.rationale: The constructional role a form fills is part of whether it fits the active response or dependency frame.
Operator value can be part of frame fit when the frame requires a public-update, role-tracking, or dependency-licensing value.
The update role configured by the surrounding discourse provides contextual warrant for whether a form fits the active frame.
Fit with a recurrent constructional frame is evidence that the relation belongs to an accountable operator-like repertoire.
Frame fit warrants community licensing when the relevant community treats that frame as a licensed response or dependency environment.
Constructional function provides evidence about whether a dependency configuration is licensed in that construction.
The construction's discourse role can condition whether a dependency configuration is licensed.
For extraction and dependency cards, construction-specific dependency licensing is a necessary component of community licensing.
Recoverable meaning can raise reported acceptability even when frame fit or dependency licensing is absent.
Lower licensing in the active frame predicts higher repair or reformulation pressure.
Membership in an accountable operator-like repertoire warrants grammar-relevant attribution.
Community licensing is contextual warrant for grammaticality attribution, not the attribution itself.
Repair pressure can provide contextual warrant for a grammar-relevant attribution.
Reported acceptability provides contextual evidence for attribution but is not identical to licensing.
Task framing changes whether respondents treat a frame mismatch as grammar, meaning, register, or repair trouble.

score_status.scope: Question-answer frame fit and construction-specific dependency licensing module; not a general grammaticality account.
